subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! Before Thy servant have appeared these souls who have detached themselves from their homes and [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فسبحانک اللهم یا الهی قد حضروا بین یدی عبدک هولاء الذین انقطعوا عن دیارهم و
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
